title: borreria capitata
intro: Borreria capitata, also known as Yellow Button Bush, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Borreria capitata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Borreria capitata can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
